name: Dice Dice Dice
short_description: This is a casual deck-building game based on dice rolling. Players will rely on their choices and some luck to achieve victory.
detailed_description:
This is a casual deck-building game based on dice rolling. Players will rely on their choices and some luck to achieve victory.

Gameplay Introduction

Players simply need to choose the appropriate items and adjust their positions on the field, then press the roll button to complete a round of operations. Leave the rest to good luck!

Content Introduction

It includes 125 items and 30 passive items, with continuous adjustments and additions in future updates.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil
